'''Marjune''' was the first [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Tirahnn system/Legends|Tirahnn system]] of the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]] Territories. It was a barren, rocky world.

==Appearances==
*{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20040122threat|text=Triplet Threat|int=Triplet Threat}} {{1stm}}
